free_text: Differential elastic cross sections for protons
Two targets were used for those
measurements. Both targets were made from the same
The areal densities of these targets were
a 500-mu surface-barrier detector for the delta-E
detector and a lithium-drifted silicon detector for the
E-detector. The depth of the E-detector was 2 mm at
lower energies and 3 mm at higher energies. In
addition to the E + delta-E, there was a second
detector used as a monitor for the system.
Elastic scattering at forward angles was corrected on
the uncertainty in the corrections for carbon
